mapper.select: SELECT employee_id , first_name , last_name , email ,phone_number , hire_date , job_id , salary , commission_pct , manager_id ,department_id FROM employees ORDER BY employee_id
SELECT employee_id , first_name , last_name , email , phone_number , hire_date , job_id , salary , commission_pct , manager_id , department_id FROM employees WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}

SELECT employee_id , first_name , last_name , email ,phone_number ,hire_date , job_id , salary , commission_pct , manager_id ,department_id FROM employees
job_id LIKE '%' || #{jobId}||'%'
OR manager_id = #{managerId}
ORDER BY employee_id
